label: Integration
headline: Operations take shape in the physical world.
lead: We design and implement infrastructure, security, and systems that protect, communicate, control, and optimize each space. From one specific need to a complete project, every solution adapts to the reality of the operation.
introMeta: One solution or several coordinated disciplines.
catalogCopy: Each solution can address a specific need or coordinate with others when the project requires it.
orbitInstructions: Carousel with seven solutions. Use the arrow keys, buttons, wheel, or swipe horizontally to change the active solution. Press Enter to explore it.
projectTitle: One specific solution or a complete project
projectCopy: Every project starts with a different need. We can address a specific requirement through one solution or coordinate several disciplines when operations require a broader scope. Ecosat defines, implements, and maintains only the infrastructure and systems the project actually needs.
conversationCopy: We can start with a known solution, several solutions, or a need that requires guidance.

summary.cctv: Visibility, evidence, and supervision to protect assets, people, and operations.
summary.climatizacion-refrigeracion: Thermal control, comfort, and preservation for critical spaces and processes.
summary.incendios: Detection, alerting, and response to reduce risk and protect continuity.
summary.accesos: Identity, authorization, and traceability to control who enters and when.
summary.bms: Centralized supervision to operate buildings more efficiently.
summary.voz-y-datos: Stable, scalable communications infrastructure designed to grow.
summary.audio-y-video: Clear systems for communication, collaboration, and presentation in physical spaces.

cctv.definition: CCTV monitors critical spaces, strengthens security, and provides visual evidence for better operational decisions.
cctv.note: Technical discussion covers coverage requirements, recording, video-management platforms, network, storage, and project-specific analytics. Not every capability applies to every project.

climatizacion-refrigeracion.definition: Systems, equipment, and infrastructure maintain the environmental and thermal conditions each space, process, or operation requires.
applications: Spaces with specific ventilation or extraction needs
details: Maintenance, corrective service, and technical support
climatizacion-refrigeracion.note: Capabilities may be common, optional, site-dependent, or separately assessed. Service covers diagnostics, design, implementation, commissioning, preventive maintenance, corrective response, and operational continuity.

incendios.definition: Detection, alerting, suppression, infrastructure, and maintenance protect people, assets, and operational continuity before and during an event.
details: Modernization, maintenance, corrective service, and technical support
incendios.note: Protection is a coordinated system, not isolated alarms or extinguishers. Scope distinguishes detection and alarm, suppression, hydraulic infrastructure, complementary equipment, and specialized site assessment.

accesos.definition: Devices, credentials, permissions, and physical infrastructure regulate entry and movement through an operation.
applications: One- or multi-building and multi-site operations
accesos.note: The solution balances protection with everyday use. Access methods, physical devices, biometrics, and integrations are defined by the site and do not all apply to every project.

bms.definition: Field equipment, sensors, controllers, communications, supervision, and control form a coordinated building-management architecture.
details: HVAC, lighting, electrical, pumps, meters, and compatible systems
bms.note: BMS is physical automation and building-control infrastructure, not a generic intelligence platform. Incorporating each system depends on infrastructure, protocols, controllers, and technical compatibility.

voz-y-datos.definition: Cabling, pathways, connection points, and distribution infrastructure sustain an operation's communications.
applications: Construction, renovation, expansion, and multi-site operations
details: Distribution components, racks, and telecommunications rooms
Support infrastructure for wireless, telephony, security, and building systems
voz-y-datos.note: Physical infrastructure is distinct from active equipment, wireless, telephony, manufacturer components, and specialized design. Final performance depends on infrastructure, active equipment, configuration, services, and operating conditions.

audio-y-video.definition: Visualization, sound, collaboration, connectivity, and control systems enable communication in physical spaces.
details: Approved digital signage, videowalls, acoustic coordination, programming, commissioning, modernization, standardization, and service
audio-y-video.note: The solution responds to the space, users, content, audio clarity, compatible devices or platforms, and daily use. Core infrastructure, optional platforms, signage, acoustics, and specialized engineering are defined per project.
